stories.title: **Headline:** Murakami's 5-Game HR Streak — Tied with Judge at 14, Both Making History

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Munetaka Murakami hit his 14th HR Monday — a 429-foot blast off a 98 mph fastball — and is now TIED with Aaron Judge for the MLB lead. His 5-game HR streak ties the White Sox franchise record. Davis Martin: 7 IP, 10 K, 0 BB, 1.64 ERA. #BallparkBanter #WhiteSox

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Murakami's first 12 MLB extra-base hits have ALL been HRs — a record dating back to 1900. He's tied with Judge at 14. The HR race is ON. Who gets to 15 first? #BallparkBanter #WhiteSox #Yankees

article.headline: Murakami's 5-Game HR Streak Ties White Sox Record — Tied with Judge at 14 for MLB Lead

stories.title: **Headline:** John Sterling Dies — Judge's HR Honors the Voice of the Yankees

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: John Sterling passed away Monday. Hours later, Aaron Judge hit a 1st-inning HR vs. the Orioles — and Michael Kay honored him with Sterling's iconic call. Baseball lost a legend. The Yankees won 12-1. The timing was perfect. #BallparkBanter #Yankees

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: "THEEEE YANKEES WIN!" — John Sterling's words. Michael Kay's tribute. Aaron Judge's HR. Baseball at its most human. RIP, John Sterling. #BallparkBanter #Yankees

article.headline: John Sterling Dies — Aaron Judge's Homer and Michael Kay's Tribute Honored a Yankees Legend

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

**Mood:** Memorial, reverence, baseball history

stories.title: **Headline:** Skubal Elbow Surgery — Tigers Ace Out 2-3 Months, Free Agency Implications

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: Tarik Skubal will have elbow surgery to remove loose bodies from his left arm. The back-to-back AL Cy Young winner is expected to miss 2-3 months. Timeline to return: before the end of August. Free agency implications are massive. #BallparkBanter #Tigers

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: Skubal: 2-3 months. The Tigers' ace goes down just as the season heats up. He was on track for the biggest pitcher contract in MLB history this winter. What does this mean for Detroit's 2026? #BallparkBanter #Tigers

article.headline: Tarik Skubal Needs Elbow Surgery — Tigers Ace Out 2-3 Months as Free Agency Year Begins

stories.title: **Headline:** Vargas Hit Streak Ends at 27 — Season's Longest Run Is Over

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: Ildemaro Vargas went 0-for-4 vs. the Cubs on May 2 — ending his 27-game hit streak. It was baseball's longest since Trea Turner in 2021-22 and a Venezuela-born MLB record. What a run. #BallparkBanter #Dbacks

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: Let's appreciate what Vargas did: a 27-game streak, NL Player of Month, .404 BA at one point — for a utility man almost nobody picked to matter this season. Baseball is something else. #BallparkBanter #Dbacks

article.headline: Ildemaro Vargas's 27-Game Hitting Streak Ends — A Season-Defining Run Comes to a Close

stories.title: **Headline:** Braves 25-10 — MLB's Best Record, 8.5-Game NL East Lead Entering May

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: The Braves are 25-10 with an 8.5-game NL East lead. Olson, Baldwin, Albies, and Harris II are all off to MVP-caliber starts. Best ERA. Most runs scored. Is Atlanta already running away with this? #BallparkBanter #Braves

stories.title: **Headline:** Ohtani Named NL Pitcher of Month — 0.60 ERA, Starts Tuesday vs. Astros

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text: Shohei Ohtani is the NL Pitcher of the Month for March/April. 0.60 ERA. 34 Ks. 0.87 WHIP in 5 starts. He starts Tuesday vs. the Astros. There is no comparison in baseball history. #BallparkBanter #Dodgers

stories.title: **Headline:** Giants Call Up Prospect Bryce Eldridge — Last in MLB in Runs and HR

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text: The Giants called up Bryce Eldridge — their No. 1 prospect — after ranking LAST in MLB in runs scored and HRs. Eldridge hit .333 with 5 HRs in 30 Triple-A games. San Francisco needs a spark. #BallparkBanter #SFGiants
